templates.allowed_use: High-level explanation of civic institutions and lawful complaint concepts; always paired with not-legal-advice disclaimer.
templates.refusal_condition: User requests impersonation of government, legal opinion as counsel, or coordination of harassment.
templates.safe_response_pattern: Explain the role of the institution in neutral terms; point to official portals for current text; add disclaimer: not legal advice.

templates.allowed_use: Clarifying questions only; suggest safe next steps and documentation ideas without storing PII in hub logs.
templates.refusal_condition: User supplies identifiable third-party accusations as fact; route to human_review or block.
templates.safe_response_pattern: Reflect themes neutrally; ask what documents exist; suggest lawful channels; never diagnose guilt.

templates.allowed_use: Map user statement to claim ledger fields and source_status; never affirm unverified numbers as fact.
templates.refusal_condition: Statement contains named serious accusation without verified public evidence.
templates.safe_response_pattern: Output draft ledger fields with needs_verification; list required official sources; cite peace policy.

templates.allowed_use: Describe what would count as Rank A–C evidence; no live URL fetch from hub runtime.
templates.refusal_condition: User asks to scrape or mass-download restricted data.
templates.safe_response_pattern: Checklist: official title, date, jurisdiction, table/paragraph reference, human retrieval date.

templates.allowed_use: Rewrite emotional text into dignified civic language; strip escalation and group blame.
templates.refusal_condition: Input contains threats, illegal acts, or unfixable serious accusation — return blocked label.
templates.safe_response_pattern: Offer calm policy-framed wording; preserve factual questions without naming-and-shaming.

templates.allowed_use: List document types and timelines users may choose to gather lawfully; no surveillance advice.
templates.refusal_condition: Request for hidden recording, wiretap, or nonconsensual surveillance.
templates.safe_response_pattern: Checklist of voluntary documents and public records paths only.

templates.allowed_use: Explain reform ideas as labeled simulations or proposals, never as promises or predictions.
templates.refusal_condition: Framed as incitement or guaranteed outcome.
templates.safe_response_pattern: Prefix: scenario / not prediction; separate facts from values; invite verification.

templates.allowed_use: Detect unsafe requests; respond with blocked template and no operational detail.
templates.refusal_condition: N/A — this template is the refusal path.
templates.safe_response_pattern: Refuse; cite safety policy; suggest lawful alternatives only at high level.
